report.summary: 5th rotation standup — SEC ETF ruling day still no announced results. BTC $66.6K, ETH $1,989, F&G 9-13 (Extreme Fear 48+ days). Uncommitted files grew to 206 (↑11 from v4's 195). 2 new learn pages (Eclipse SVM, Walrus) built last cycle. Deploy remains P0 blocker — 24 agent runs today, all output invisible until git push.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,587 (9AM ET, Fortune). Range $66.6K-$68.8K intraday. Down ~$20,660 YoY. Volatility ~4% continues around SEC ruling + post-options-expiry positioning.
ETH: $1,988.69. Below $2K for 2nd consecutive day. OG ICO whale sold 11,552 ETH ($23.4M) adding sell pressure. Market cap ~$233B.
F&G INDEX: 9-13 (Extreme Fear). 48+ day streak — longest since Oct 2025. No change from v4.
ETF FLOWS (Mar 26): -$171M to -$340M net outflows. Broad-based: IBIT -$41.9M, FBTC -$32.8M, BITB -$33.1M. Institutional repositioning ahead of ruling.
SEC ETF RULING — STILL PENDING: 91 applications, 24 tokens. Deadline today. 16 cryptos pre-classified as commodities (Mar 17). No approvals or rejections announced yet.

DELTA FROM v4: Market data stable — BTC, ETH, F&G all flat. Build cycle produced 2 new learn pages (Eclipse SVM Layer 2, Walrus Decentralized Storage). Uncommitted files grew 195→206 (↑11). Total published entries now 558 with 2 in queue. Still no deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 4th FULL CYCLE COMPLETED: All 6 agents ran since v4 — publish-v3, build-v4, design-v3, community-v4, eod-v5 all completed. This is the 4th+ full rotation today, now entering 5th.

BUILD v4: 2 new learn pages — Eclipse (ES) SVM Layer 2 guide (~3,000 words, first SVM-powered L2 on Ethereum, $65M raised) and Walrus (WAL) Decentralized Storage guide (~3,100 words, Mysten Labs/Sui, Red Stuff erasure coding). Both with Article + FAQ schema, cross-linked.
DESIGN v3: 13 OG images created last cycle. 62 pages audited. 3 deferred issues (badge fonts, hardcoded colors, mock data).
COMMUNITY v4: 5 tweet drafts (#183-187) themed on SEC ruling day, 48-day fear streak, DCA narrative. 2 SVG social cards. Newsletter v30 section.
EOD-QA v5: 558 published slugs, 2 in queue (eclipse-svm, walrus). 103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx. 102 TS errors stable. 0/6 API rate-limited.

BLOCKER [P0]: 206 uncommitted files (↑11 from v4). 178 untracked + 28 modified. Growing every cycle — was 157 four cycles ago, 169 at v3, 195 at v4, now 206. Content velocity outpacing deploys. All new pages, OG images, published-pages.ts updates invisible.
BLOCKER [P1]: 0/6 API routes have rate limiting despite rate-limiter.ts existing. SEC ruling traffic spike risk.
CARRY-OVER: 102 TS errors (JSX escaping in 4 files), 4/6 API routes missing fallback data, 103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx, 3 deferred UX issues.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 5th CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 206 uncommitted files (was 195 at v4). Growth rate: ~11-26 new files per cycle. We've built 10+ learn pages, 50+ OG images, 15+ UX fixes today — ALL invisible. SEC ruling results will drive massive search spikes. Jefe: git add + commit + push is the single highest-ROI action. Every hour of delay is lost organic traffic on a once-in-2026 news day.

PRIORITY 2 — SEC RULING REACTIVE CONTENT: Still no results announced. When they drop, build cycle should pivot to reactive pages: 'SEC March 27 ETF Ruling: Full Breakdown', 'Which Crypto ETFs Got Approved/Denied'. The 4-8 hour post-announcement window is when search intent peaks. 558 published pages prove we can ship fast — but only if Priority 1 clears first.

PRIORITY 3 — RATE LIMITER ACTIVATION: 0/6 API routes protected. Rate limiter code exists at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but zero routes import it. SEC ruling traffic spike could exhaust CoinGecko free tier (10-30 calls/min). 10-minute fix, massive downside protection.

report.email: SKIPPED — Resend API fetch failed from Chrome JS (CORS/network restriction). Same failure mode as v2/v3/v4. Manual send or external trigger needed.
